name: Infographic Rainbow Color Scheme — Research Methodology Spectrum
input: Create a process flow showing the research methodology spectrum from qualitative to quantitative: Ethnography → Case Study → Mixed Methods → Survey Research → Experimental Design → Meta-Analysis. Use rainbow color scheme.
qualityCriteria: Arrows between steps implied by process flow
No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: Process flow with rainbow coloring showing methodology continuum.

data.title: Research Methodology Spectrum

items.label: Ethnography
items.description: Deep immersion in cultural context, qualitative data collection

items.label: Case Study
items.description: In-depth analysis of specific instances or phenomena

items.label: Mixed Methods
items.description: Integration of qualitative and quantitative approaches

items.label: Survey Research
items.description: Structured data collection from representative samples

items.label: Experimental Design
items.description: Controlled manipulation of variables with randomization

items.label: Meta-Analysis
items.description: Statistical synthesis of multiple study findings

data.caption: Continuum from qualitative to quantitative research methodologies
